ksa_text: Participate in the data governance council and stewardship community, representing the assigned domain's interests and escalating unresolved issues through established channels.

dcwf.top_element_label: Assess policy needs and collaborate with stakeholders to develop policies to govern cyber activities.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA DG-T-012 (DG, Task) does not clear the moderate fit inclusion threshold of 0.43. Composite score 0.4298 is insufficient to establish relevance to survey design, statistical analysis, and research data management at IC-to-senior-IC level. Framework signals (nist_ai_rmf=0.430, ddat=0.421, nice=0.417) do not demonstrate sufficient alignment with core analytics/BI work.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: P2 exclude upheld. Score 0.4298 below threshold for moderate fit domain; no rescuing analytics text signals. No internal inconsistencies identified.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: External validation: does DG-domain KSA DG-T-012 (composite 0.4298) appear in published data analyst or BI role profiles?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Composite 0.4298 for DG domain does not meet the evidentiary bar for ANL IC-level inclusion per DAMA DMBOK governance competencies; governance awareness at practitioner level appears in O*NET 15-2051 expanded skill sets. External sources confirm this competency is not a standard expectation for Survey Researcher at the targeted seniority band.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: P3 exclude upheld. External evidence confirms DG domain KSA at composite 0.4298 is not a standard requirement for Survey Researcher at IC-to-senior-IC level.

decision_rationale: Pipeline consensus: exclude. P2 exclude confirmed by P3 (internal) and P4 (external) adversarial agents. Zero overturns. Composite 0.4298, domain DG, scope moderate fit. High confidence.
